stemHtml:
A flight crew of a turbojet aeroplane prepares a Commercial Air Transport flight using the following information. Determine the allowed take-off mass for this flight:

Maximum Take-Off Mass: 62 800 kg
Maximum Landing Mass: 54 900 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass:50 300 kg
Take-off Mass is NOT performance limited
Performance-Limited Landing Mass at destination: 53 950 kg
Block Fuel: 9720 kg
Taxi Fuel: 120 kg
Trip Fuel: 6160 kg
Reserve Fuel (contingency, alternate and final): 2660 kg
